name: セレスティア・ルーンベルク
prompt:
Photorealistic fantasy novel insert art, cinematic natural light, realistic skin texture, high detail fabric, high detail hair, believable proportions, clean background separation, vertical full-body or 3/4 portrait, centered composition with headroom and footroom, premium live-action look.
Create a photorealistic character portrait of Celestia Runebelk, a late-20s female royal investigator. She has silver-gray long hair tied back, cold sharp eyes, disciplined posture, and the aura of an elite field officer. Outfit: dark navy cloak, refined light armor, slim rapier at the waist, short wand on the back or in hand. She should look like a hybrid of knight and mage: precise, competent, restrained, dangerous. Expression should be cool and watchful, with only a trace of buried concern. Background: dim village interior or wind-swept road to the capital. Realistic fantasy intelligence officer, not glamorous idol styling.
Center the subject and leave generous margin on both left and right sides for a later narrow crop.
Keep the whole character visible within frame when possible, especially head, key costume details, hands, silhouette, and signature accessories.
Final delivery will be cropped to 1080x2304, so compose safely.
Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, chibi, cartoon, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, extra fingers, low detail face, flat lighting, text, logo, watermark, frame, collage, duplicated ears, duplicated tail, blurry eyes, smiling idol pose, ornate princess dress, oversized armor, cartoon magic effects
